function e(e)return M[e+(-700001-(-759342))]end for e,D in ipairs({{422193-422192,896224+-895936},{9624+-9623;616651-616368};{1026696-1026412;-763326+763614}})do while D[-388234-(-388235)]<D[-839725+839727]do local e=table.concat local D=string.len local K=math.floor local
